Title: Inspect SDR prospect detail

As a SDR operator
I want a detail surface for the selected prospect
So that I can inspect sends, draft state, and prospect context without leaving the list

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The SDR workspace can open a prospect-detail surface from the prospects list.
- [ ] The detail surface receives prospect, send, and approval-item context plus refresh hooks.

Notes: The detail component is present; I did not verify every detail field or refresh path.
